Key Rules What You Need to Know

13-Man Weeks (Origin On)

R12, R15 and R18 — Origin is active, you only field 13 players and get extra trades. Easy to patch missing byes.

17-Man Weeks (Full Squad)

R13, R16 and R19 — Full squad required. Origin players can play but may be rested or minutes managed.

Priority Order

Sort 17-man coverage first. Patch 13-man weeks second. Target teams playing R13/R16/R19, avoid teams that miss them.

Bye Analysis Best Teams to Target

Teams Playing All 3 Big Bye Rounds (R12/R15/R18) — Ranked by SOS

  • Dolphins SOS #5 (62) — 1 bye (R13, 17-man week)
  • Bunnies SOS #8 (59) — 2 byes (R13, R16 — both 17-man weeks ⚠️)
  • Titans SOS #16 (37) — 2 byes (R13, R16 — both 17-man weeks ⚠️)

1 Bye in a Big Bye Round — Best SOS (Play All 3 Mini/17-Man Rounds)

  • Raiders SOS #1 (81) — 1 bye (R18) 🔥 The standout
  • Manly SOS #3 (72) — 1 bye (R15)
  • Tigers SOS #4 (65) — 1 bye (R12)

Teams Playing All 3 Mini Bye Rounds (R13/R16/R19) — Ranked by SOS

  • Raiders SOS #1 (81) — 1 bye (R18)
  • Roosters SOS #2 (77) — 2 byes (R12, R18 — both 13-man weeks ✅)
  • Manly SOS #3 (72) — 1 bye (R15)
  • Tigers SOS #4 (65) — 1 bye (R12)
  • Knights SOS #6 (61) — 2 byes (R12, R15 — both 13-man weeks ✅)
  • Bulldogs SOS #7 (60) — 2 byes (R15, R18 — both 13-man weeks ✅)
  • Sharks SOS #13 (49) — 2 byes (R12, R17)
  • Warriors SOS #11 (52) — 2 byes (R14, R18)
  • Storm SOS #9 (56) — 2 byes (R15, R18)
  • Cowboys SOS #15 (40) — 2 byes (R15, R18)

The Blueprint Summary

Raiders, Manly and Tigers are your 1-bye teams that play all three 17-man rounds. Raiders #1 SOS is the standout with the best SOS in the comp through this period. Dolphins also a consideration with only one bye but that round you will need 17 players.

Roosters, Knights, Bulldogs, Warriors, Storm and Cowboys are your 17-man coverage teams — manageable bye schedules and solid draws.

Panthers and Broncos are absolute hard avoids — three byes each, worst SOS in the comp, miss multiple 17-man weeks. Sell them now while prices are still good.

Titans are a trap — two byes landing on R13 and R16, second worst SOS. Get out. Bunnies need careful management — their two byes fall on R13 and R16. The SOS is fine but the bye timing is the problem.

Team Deep Dives By Tier

LEVEL 1 — MUST HAVES

Raiders, Roosters, Manly, Tigers — best SOS, fewest byes, play all critical 17-man rounds.

Raiders

SOS #1 (81)
R18 only — 13-man week easy patch

Standout of the entire period. Best SOS in the comp, only miss one 17-man week. Play all three critical rounds R13, R16, R19.

  • Savelio TamaleCTW#1
  • Seb KrisCTW#1
  • Ethan SandersHFB#3
  • Ethan Strange5/8#1
  • Tom StarlingHOK#1
  • Hudson Young/Hosking2RF#1
  • Noah Martin2RF#2

Roosters

SOS #2 (77)
R12 + R18 — both 13-man weeks ✅

Miss R12 and R18 but both are 13-man weeks so easy to patch. Play R13, R16, R19.

  • James TedescoFLB#3
  • Daniel TupouCTW#3
  • Hugo SavalaCTW#3
  • Sam WalkerHFB#5
  • DCE5/8#3
  • Siua Wong2RF#5

Manly

SOS #3 (72)
R15 only — 13-man week easy patch

One bye, play all 17-man weeks. Tomty injured changes the picture — monitor.

Tigers

SOS #4 (65)
R12 only — 13-man week easy patch

One bye on a 13-man week — easy patch. Play all 17-man weeks. Luai #1 HFB SOS, KPP #1 2RF SOS.

  • Jarome LuaiHFB#1
  • Kai Pearce-Paul2RF#1

LEVEL 2 — STRONG TARGETS

Dolphins, Knights, Bulldogs, Storm, Warriors — manageable byes, solid draws.

Dolphins

SOS #5 (64)
R13 — critical 17-man week ⚠️

One bye but it lands on a 17-man week. Need cover for R13. Strong SOS otherwise.

  • HTF/Trai FullerFLB#4
  • Jake AverilloCTW#3
  • Jamayne IsaakoCTW#1
  • Isaiya KatoaHFB#2

Knights

SOS #6 (61)
R12 + R15 — both big bye rounds ✅

Both byes on big bye rounds but both are manageable 13-man weeks. Play R13, R16, R19.

  • Greg MarzhewCTW#5
  • Bradman BestCTW#5
  • Dylan Lucas2RF#2

Bulldogs

SOS #7 (60)
R15 + R18 — both 13-man weeks ✅

Both byes on 13-man weeks — brilliant coverage. Play all three 17-man weeks.

  • Stephen Crichton/Enari TualaCTW#1
  • Marcelo MontoyaCTW#3

⚠️ CAUTION

Bunnies — great SOS but both byes hit 17-man weeks. Latrell is Origin certain.

Bunnies

SOS #8 (62)
R13 + R16 — BOTH 17-man weeks ⚠️⚠️

SOS is actually fine but the bye timing kills them. Both byes on 17-man weeks. Latrell Origin certain. Need cover for two critical rounds.

  • Latrell MitchellCTW#14

🚨 NUCLEAR AVOIDS

Panthers, Broncos, Titans — worst SOS, most byes, miss critical rounds. Sell now.

Panthers

SOS #17 (31)
R12 + R15 + R19 — WORST possible

Worst SOS in the comp. Three byes. Origin certainties in Cleary and Yeo. Every single reason to sell. No reason to hold a single Panther.

  • Dylan EdwardsFLB#17
  • Tom JenkinsCTW#17
  • Nathan ClearyHFB#14
  • Isaah YeoLCK#15
  • Isaiah Papalii2RF#16
  • Luke Garner2RF#17

Broncos

SOS #15 (40)
R12 + R16 + R19 — 3 byes, miss 17-man weeks

Three byes, miss R16 and R19 — both 17-man weeks. Third worst SOS. Carrigan Origin. Avoid everything.

  • Kotoni StaggsCTW#17
  • Deine MarinerCTW#17
  • Adam ReynoldsHFB#16
  • Jordan Riki2RF#16
  • Patty CarriganLCK#16

Titans

SOS #16 (36)
R13 + R16 — BOTH 17-man weeks 🚨

Both byes land directly on 17-man weeks — the worst possible timing. Second worst SOS. Jayden Campbell, Arama Hau — all sell.

  • Keano KiniFLB#16
  • Phillip SamiCTW#16
  • AJ BrimsonCTW#15
  • Lachlan IliasHFB#17
  • Jayden CampbellHFB#17
  • Beau Fermor2RF#17

Classic Plan — FLB

Must HavesJames Tedesco
Trades—
Origin Considerations Who to Hold, Who to Sell

Origin Rounds

R12, R15, R18 are 13-man weeks. Origin players can be held — you only need 13. Watch minute management in surrounding rounds.

17-Man Rounds

R13, R16, R19 — Origin players play but minutes may be managed post-series. Coaches will be cautious.

The Sell Signal

If a player is Origin certain AND plays for a nuclear avoid team, the sell case is overwhelming. Don't wait.

Panthers
  • CERT Nathan Cleary
  • CERT Isaah Yeo
  • PROB Brian To'o
  • MAYBE Dylan Edwards
Broncos
  • CERT Pat Carrigan
  • INJ Payne Haas
  • PROB Reece Walsh
  • MAYBE Kotoni Staggs
Bunnies
  • CERT Latrell Mitchell
  • MAYBE Tallis Duncan
  • PROB Cam Murray
Roosters
  • MAYBE James Tedesco
  • PROB Mark Nawaqanitawase
  • PROB Reece Robson
  • MAYBE Sam Walker

Origin Hold/Sell Framework

SELL: Cleary, Yeo — Origin certain AND Panthers (nuclear avoid). Carrigan — Origin certain AND Broncos (nuclear avoid). Indefensible holds.

MANAGE: Latrell, Murray — Bunnies have decent SOS but both byes hit 17-man weeks. Need cover for two critical rounds.

HOLD: Tedesco, Nawaqanitawase, Walker — Roosters byes both land on 13-man weeks. Easy holds through the period.

Dream Team Notes

The team is built around Raiders/Roosters/Manly/Tigers players with the best SOS and most favourable bye structures. Max Plath (HOK) is the standout cheap option with a low BE of 30.

KPP has a high BE of 127 — needs to go big through this period. Hudson Young at 47 BE is the value play in 2RF. Haumole off the bench as FLEX with a BE of just 37.

Herbie Farnworth (CTW) is the must-have. James Tedesco (FLB) despite the high BE is the #3 positional SOS — hold.
